subject: feat(phase3): add signing, notes, version history, and sequence sign-off
body:
Phase 3 frontend implementation adds the complete signing and negotiation
tracking layer. Modules can now be independently signed by both parties
with auto-lock when both mark ready, batch signing for efficiency, and
amendment flow that preserves version history. Notes with source tagging
enable tracking of discussions across channels. Sequence sign-off ensures
both parties approve the final module ordering before an agreement is
fully locked.

Tags: signing, notes, version-history, ui, hooks, components
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: phase3-signing-notes-versions
Semver: minor
